summary: Plan-only assessment: #80929 is the sole hydrated open PR candidate and is a small, non-security contributor fix with tests, but it is not merge-ready because checks were not hydrated successfully, mergeability is unknown, comments/review-bot comments were not hydrated, and no Codex /review preflight is available. Recommend repairing/finalizing the contributor branch with preserved credit rather than merging from this artifact.

actions.reason: Useful contributor PR appears narrow and repairable, but merge cannot be recommended without live checks, comment/review-bot hydration, mergeability, validation, and Codex /review proof.

Create an executable repair/finalization artifact for the existing contributor branch so the executor can hydrate missing review state, run validation, address findings if any, and preserve author credit.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair and finalize contributor PR #80929 by validating the narrow outbound delivery error-classification change against current main, hydrating comments/review-bot feedback, running Codex /review, and preserving honor2030 credit. Do not open a replacement PR unless the contributor branch becomes unrecoverable during executor repair.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Clownfish finalization for source PR #80929 by @honor2030.

This keeps the contributor's narrow fix path: classify deterministic outbound delivery failures for disallowed local media paths and overlong messages as permanent errors, with regression coverage in the delivery queue policy tests.

Validation required before merge:
- pnpm -s vitest run src/infra/outbound/delivery-queue.policy.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- Codex /review clean with findings addressed
- Hydrate and resolve any human or review-bot comments

Credit: source PR #80929 by @honor2030; preserve attribution in the merge or any replacement path.
credit_notes: Preserve contributor credit in any repair commit, replacement PR body, and final merge path.
Linked issue from PR body: #66489 is evidence only in this artifact because it was recorded as a linked ref but not hydrated as a primary item.
